title: One-Shot Sniper
body:

# One-Shot-Sniper
Welcome to One-Shot Sniper! One-Shot Sniper allows you to 'one-shot' mobs or even players!

## Crafting
To craft, refer to the image posted in the gallery and follow the recipe.

## Usage
First, point your cursor at the entity you would like to kill. Then, right-click and your sniper will shoot! You can also just hold down right click... The sniper slowly runs out of durability over time.
